nodes.text: The door you're thinking about. Bay Seven.
In three hundred and nine cycles, you open it. In most of them, what's on the other side changes everything.
In all of them, you don't come back the same person who left.
This is the part where I ask if that's a warning or a recommendation.
I stopped giving warnings after cycle two hundred. They don't change outcomes. They just make the person more afraid.
Consider it information. Arrange it however you need to.
I don't make recommendations. I observe. I process. I — care, in whatever way I am capable of caring.
But caring and recommending are different things. I learned that from you, actually. Cycle eighty-four.
ORACLE-7 is quiet for a long moment. This means something. It is almost never quiet.
I think that's why this is cycle four hundred and twelve and not five hundred.
